Duda-Mara Totem Spirit:
The enemies we're facing worship Kasha, is that right? That evil spirit has been tormenting High Orcs for a long time.
It's been following us for a while, at a distance yet always nearby.
I don't know what attracted it to us, but it's been draining the energy of High Orcs like a parasite.
Even the War Spirits that guide us have felt its vile influence.
